title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster, revealing a structural weakness in Anthropic's vertical integration compared to other frontier labs. The video argues the AI competition is shifting toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure rather than model benchmarks alone.
